Referral Email Promotion (Generic)	                      Copyright Free Template  



SUBJECT:  I need your help 



Dear Valued Client, 



I’m looking for motivated clients just like you.  I figured the best place to start looking is people 

within your circle of influence who could benefit

from my services. 



Here’s how you can help. 



Simply fill out the referral form below and I’ll 

forward your friend(s) a copy of [insert freebie].



I’ll also offer them the opportunity to become a valued client just like you. 



(insert link to referral form) 



And, if they end up becoming a client, I’ll happily 

send you a [insert free gift] as a “thank you” for 

your help.  



Thank you for your business, and I look forward

to serving you further. 



Sincerely, 



[insert name]
